scope: LFA-P2 reduction target enforcement, .mjs scan coverage, manifest target metadata, and plan consistency

blocking_findings.summary: Manifest entry status only required presence, not a closed enum. A status such as completed or done could bypass planned_refactor reduction_target checks and accepted rechallenge checks.

non_blocking_findings.summary: The first review wanted an explicit test proving a new .mjs large file cannot use manifest backfill as a bypass.
The manifest contains six .mjs planned_refactor entries, while the plan discusses five newly backfilled hidden .mjs files; tools/workbench-server.mjs was already listed before this phase.
Some targets below 500 lines had next_phase wording that assumed the file would remain above 500.

delta_fixes.summary: tools/report-large-files.mjs now allows only accepted and planned_refactor status values and reports manifest_entry_invalid_status for other values.
test/large-file-reduction-targets.test.js now proves status completed fails closed.
test/large-file-reduction-targets.test.js now proves a new large .mjs file with a manifest entry triggers both new_large_file_manifest_entry and new_large_file_added.

The plan now lists .mjs in the debt extension set, states status values are a closed enum, and clarifies that five hidden .mjs files were newly backfilled while tools/workbench-server.mjs was already listed.
Manifest targets below 500 lines now say to refresh status with evidence if the target drops below threshold, otherwise continue staged extraction.

evidence: All three DeepSeek shards returned PASS.
Status closed set check: accepted and planned_refactor are the only allowed statuses; done/completed fail closed.
Reduction target math prevents 2000+ line files from completing with only 100-200 line reduction.
New .mjs large files cannot bypass via manifest backfill; filesystem scan and new_large_file_added/new_large_file_manifest_entry enforce the check.

Historical five hidden .mjs backfills are documented separately from the already-listed tools/workbench-server.mjs; manifest contains six .mjs planned_refactor files, all with reduction_target metadata.
